overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk through a rainy urban commercial area toward an Ammu-Nation gun store, with wet pavement reflecting neon signage and streetlights.

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm-lined wet road toward the distant illuminated gun store

entered.detail: large roadside billboard with red and white signage
single-story concrete block building with illuminated signage visible in the distance
row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
tall street lamp casting yellow light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked commercial street at night, passing palm trees and a large billboard while approaching a distant illuminated gun store.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot in front of retail building

events.description: passing the billboard and entering the open parking lot area
ambient light increases as approaching the brightly lit storefront

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet parking lot toward the Ammu-Nation entrance

entered.detail: illuminated red and blue sign on the roof of the building
light poles illuminating the parking area

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the scene opens into a wet parking lot with the Ammu-Nation store growing larger ahead. The roof signage becomes visible and the building's red facade is illuminated by exterior lights.

events.description: entering the bright pool of light from the store's entrance lamps

agents.ego_description: approaching the front entrance of the gun store, preparing to enter

entered.detail: bright neon sign displaying 'AMMU-NATION' in red and blue
wall sign reading 'GUNS & AMMO' in white letters
painted sign on the wall indicating the store is open

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the storefront, the camera approaches the entrance beneath glowing neon signs reading 'AMMU-NATION' and 'GUNS & AMMO'. The wet pavement reflects the bright red and blue lights of the building facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-slicked urban commercial district that culminates at the entrance of a brightly lit gun store. It begins with a walk along a wet street, passing palm trees and a large billboard while the illuminated storefront remains a distant focal point. As the camera moves past the billboard, the scene opens into a wide, rain-soaked parking lot where the red facade and roof signage of the Ammu-Nation store grow increasingly prominent. The movement then leads directly to the storefront, where the camera arrives beneath glowing neon signs reading AMMU-NATION and GUNS & AMMO. Finally, the shot settles at the entrance as the wet pavement reflects the vivid red and blue lights of the building's facade.
